# Actions

Prioritized from the proposed actions across all insights.
`review_date` is the next **check-in**, not a completion deadline.

## [action-1] Cap contract review at 30 minutes
*short horizon · score 0.62 · confidence 0.85 · review 2025-05-15* ^action-1

**Objective:** Bounded review loop

**Why:** Re-reading drags without changing decisions.

**Immediate action (7d):** Today: set a 30-min timer on next contract.

**Habit:** One pass + timer for every contract.

**Success metric:** Zero contracts re-read >2×/quarter.

**Scores:** protocol · regret 0.80 · leverage 0.50 · consequence 0.60 · generativity 0.30 · decisiveness 0.70 · feedback-speed 0.80 · constraint-fit 0.70

**Provenance:**
- **85% match**  [[2026-05-02T12-10-32Z-large/4-insights#^critical-1|Insight Critical 1]]: *"Re-reading contracts saps an outsized share."*
  - **60% match**  [[2026-05-02T12-10-32Z-large/3-patterns/work#^constraint-1|Work Constraint 1]]: *"Re-reads everything."*
    - **54% match**  [[2026-05-02T12-10-32Z-large/1-facts/work#^decision-1|Work Decision 1]]: *"Work fact 0: handles `<embedded tag>` content"*

*medium horizon · score 0.56 · confidence 0.90 · review 2025-07-01* ^action-2

**Why:** Habit stacks compound.

**Immediate action (7d):** Tomorrow: 2-min stretch post-run.

**Habit:** Daily 2-min stretch.
